title: lipotactes pauciflora
intro: Lipotactes pauciflora, also known as Chinese club fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lipotactes pauciflora include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as potentially exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Lipotactes pauciflora is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and the dried fronds can also be used in capsule or powder form.
